metadata.title: Positive Displacement (Lobe) Pumps | Welltech®
metadata.description: Stainless lobe pumps that ensure the transfer of highly viscous fluids like cream, honey, shampoo, and tomato paste without breaking their particulate structure.

hero.title: Positive Displacement Pumps
hero.desc: Precise and smooth fluid transfer of dense (high viscosity) products like honey, shampoo, cream, and tomato paste without disrupting their cellular structure.

technology.title: Lobe (Rotor) Technology
technology.desc: Unlike centrifugal pumps that agitate and crush the fluid at high speed, positive displacement lobe pumps gently push the fluid by trapping it between special counter-rotating lobes (rotors). Thanks to this technology, particles in the product (fruit pieces, fibers, etc.) are not crushed; the quality and consistency of the fluid are 100% preserved as it is transferred to the next station.

features.title: Design and Operational Advantages
items: Transfer of Delicate (Particulate) Foods Without Crushing
Constant (Pulsation-Free) and Measurable High Flow Rate
Maximum Efficiency in High Viscosity (Dense) Fluids
FDA/3A Approved 100% Hygienic Stainless Steel Body

table.title: Technical Specifications and Capacity Table
table.note: * Flow rate values and rotor type (Butterfly, Bi-Wing, Tri-Lobe) are calculated specifically based on the viscosity (density) of the product to be transferred.

items.q: What is the difference between a Lobe pump and a Centrifugal pump?
items.a: Centrifugal pumps transfer water by throwing it (fast) and cause cavitation in dense products. Lobe pumps operate volumetrically (positive); no matter how thick (viscous) the liquid is, it pushes it forward in equal amounts and without crushing the product.

Absolutely. There are no dead volumes in the internal structure of lobe pumps. They can be made 100% sterile with high-pressure hot water and chemicals using CIP (clean-in-place) systems without being removed from the installation.

reference.desc: Double-jacketed cream pump line we installed for an international biscuit and chocolate production facility.

cta.title: The Right Lobe for Your Product
cta.desc: Share your fluid's particle diameter and operating temperature with us, and let's create the most accurate (Bi-Wing or Tri-Lobe) rotor design that prevents crushing.
